content: From a very early age he amazed everyone with his extraordinary abilities to do mathematical calculations in his head without the use of pen and paper.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by Hybrid (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: arz:من زمان أوي والناس مبهورة بقدرته الفظيعة إنه يحل مسائل الرياضة في دماغه من غير ورقة ولا قلم
